title: LS24 9NS, University of Leeds: variation and permit partial surrender issued - EPR/NP3132RD/V003 and EPR/NP3132RD/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish variations and partial surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and issue letter for:    Operator name: University of Leeds   Installation name: Spen Farm   Permit number: EPR/NP3132RD/V003 and EPR/NP3132RD/S004   "
